methodsAttempted.query: site:vnu.edu.vn OR site:en.vnu.edu.vn "AI" "Vietnam National University, Hanoi" policy academic integrity privacy
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned official VNU-subdomain results, mostly journal or proceedings PDFs rather than policy evidence.
Firecrawl search found official central VNU pages about AI in student learning, including a VNU-wide first-year AI and digital technology course announcement.

methodsAttempted.query: site:vnu.edu.vn "Quy chế" "đào tạo" "trí tuệ nhân tạo" "ĐHQGHN"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found official VNU and member-school pages about AI programs and training regulations, but did not surface a formal VNU-wide generative-AI policy.
Fetched vnu.edu.vn robots.txt by HTTP; the public news path was allowed and /api, /_next, /static, /dev, /staging, and /test were disallowed.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a central VNU announcement that the Director of VNU issued Decision 3499/QD-DHQGHN to teach a Digital Technology and AI course to students from the 2025 intake. Other official AI-related results were rejected because they were event/news commentary, journals, proceedings, or AI program pages rather than policy-specific source evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Sinh viên ĐHQGHN sẽ học AI và công nghệ số từ năm nhất
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official central VNU page, scraped with Firecrawl and checked by HTTP HEAD. The page reports a Director-issued decision introducing a VNU1001 Digital Technology and AI course for regular undergraduate students from the 2025 intake.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Khơi dậy tư duy sáng tạo và sự hỗ trợ của AI trong học tập
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official central VNU article about an AI student-support seminar; useful discovery context but event/advisory coverage rather than durable policy or curriculum evidence.

artifacts.queryUsed: site:vnu.edu.vn OR site:en.vnu.edu.vn "AI" "Vietnam National University, Hanoi" policy academic integrity privacy
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official VNU member-school journal PDF result from Firecrawl search, but it is scholarly publication content and not institutional AI policy or guidance.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Ngày 24/04/2025, tại Ký túc xá Mễ Trì, Trung tâm Hỗ trợ sinh viên ĐHQGHN đã tổ chức buổi tọa đàm trực tiếp và trực tuyến với chủ đề “Trí tuệ nhân tạo - Công cụ AI và Ứng dụng thực tiễn”.
artifacts.notes: The source documents an event and expert discussion; it was not used for claims because it does not establish a durable university policy or required curriculum.
The result is an official VNU journal PDF, not institutional AI-use policy, student guidance, IT/security guidance, or curriculum policy evidence.

artifacts.title: Vietnam National University, Hanoi AI Policy Evidence Draft
artifacts.summary: Draft staging summary: official central VNU evidence supports two narrow candidate claims about a required Digital Technology and AI course for the 2025 regular undergraduate intake and the course's AI tools, academic integrity, digital safety, and ethics content. Discovery did not find a formal VNU-wide generative-AI academic-integrity policy.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
These are staged candidate claims only and are not canonical public claims.
No formal VNU-wide generative-AI academic-integrity policy was found in this discovery pass.
